lexington.name: M-10AF Lexington
lexington.description: Standard Night City sidearm. Reliable, easy to maintain, and found in every third gutter.

nue.name: Nue
nue.description: Popular Militech compact. Preferred by NCPD officers and corpo security.

malorian_3516.name: Malorian Arms 3516
malorian_3516.description: Johnny Silverhand's legendary pistol. Crafted for him personally by Robert Valdez. There is no equal.

unity.name: Unity
unity.description: A well-balanced pistol with superb accuracy. Favored by mercs who value precision.

ajax.name: Ajax
ajax.description: Militech assault rifle. Seen everywhere from corporate security to Maelstrom raids.

copperhead.name: Copperhead
copperhead.description: Budget assault rifle. Gets the job done without emptying your wallet.

widow_maker.name: Widow Maker
widow_maker.description: Panam Palmer's personal rifle. Modified for the Badlands. Hits like a freight train.

defender.name: Defender
defender.description: High-caliber assault rifle. The weapon of choice for Militech special ops.

db_2_satara.name: DB-2 Satara
db_2_satara.description: Double-barrel shotgun. Loud, messy, and remarkably persuasive at close range.

carnage.name: Carnage
carnage.description: Semi-auto combat shotgun. If it's in front of you, it won't be standing for long.

pozhar_x3.name: Pozhar X-3
pozhar_x3.description: Tech shotgun that charges its shot for devastating burst fire. Punches through cover.

problem_solver.name: Problem Solver
problem_solver.description: Placide's personal SMG. Problems go in one end and solutions come out the other.

v10_budget.name: Omaha
v10_budget.description: The cheapest SMG eddies can buy. You get what you pay for.

overwatch.name: Overwatch
overwatch.description: Panam's sniper rifle, modified to work silently in the Badlands. Precision at extreme range.

ashura.name: Ashura
ashura.description: Anti-material sniper rifle. Used by Tyger Claws rooftop sentries.

katana.name: Katana
katana.description: Sharp, fast, silent. The weapon of the Tyger Claws. Respect the blade.

satori.name: Satori
satori.description: An exquisite katana of legendary craftsmanship. Said to have been aboard the Arasaka shuttle.

baseball_bat.name: Baseball Bat
baseball_bat.description: Night City's most accessible melee weapon. No maintenance required.

gorilla_arms_weapon.name: Gorilla Arms (Weapon Mode)
gorilla_arms_weapon.description: Your cyberware arms in combat mode. Devastating, chrome-plated fists.

mantis_blades_weapon.name: Mantis Blades (Deployed)
mantis_blades_weapon.description: Blades that fold out of your forearms. Elegant. Lethal.

monowire_weapon.name: Monowire (Active)
monowire_weapon.description: A monomolecular wire launched from your palm. Can slice through almost anything.

skippy.name: Skippy
skippy.description: An AI-integrated smart pistol with a chirpy personality. Claims to be non-lethal. Spoiler: it isn't.

comrade_hammer.name: Comrade's Hammer
comrade_hammer.description: A single-shot tech revolver that holds one round. One is all you need.

leather_jacket.name: Leather Jacket
leather_jacket.description: Classic Night City street wear. Offers minimal protection but maximum attitude.

reinforced_vest.name: Reinforced Vest
reinforced_vest.description: A vest with trauma plates sewn in. Standard kit for Valentino soldiers.

militech_assault_armor.name: Militech Assault Armor
militech_assault_armor.description: Military-grade body armor. Heavy, but when bullets start flying you'll be grateful.

arasaka_light_suit.name: Arasaka Light Suit
arasaka_light_suit.description: A suit-and-armor hybrid favored by Arasaka field agents. Looks corporate. Works corporate.

legendary_cybertech_jacket.name: CyberTech Combat Jacket
legendary_cybertech_jacket.description: Bleeding-edge smart-fabric with reactive armor plating. Adapts to incoming threats.

cap_basic.name: Street Cap
cap_basic.description: Basic head protection. Better than nothing. Barely.

maelstrom_helm.name: Maelstrom Chrome Helm
maelstrom_helm.description: A chromed combat helmet scavenged from Maelstrom. Intimidating and practical.

netrunner_headset.name: Netrunner Headset
netrunner_headset.description: A neural interface headset that boosts quickhacking speed. Light, functional, expensive.

street_pants.name: Street Pants
street_pants.description: Reinforced cargo pants. More pockets than a corpo's briefcase.

tactical_pants.name: Tactical Cargo Pants
tactical_pants.description: Military-grade leg armor in a deceptively casual package.

gloves_basic.name: Combat Gloves
gloves_basic.description: Knuckle plating and wrist bracing. Basic but effective in a brawl.

subdermal_armor_item.name: Subdermal Armor Vest
subdermal_armor_item.description: Armor plating grafted under the skin. You won't feel it until someone tries to shoot you.

maxdoc_mk1.name: MaxDoc Mk.1
maxdoc_mk1.description: A basic med inhaler. Gets the blood pressure up and the bleeding down.

maxdoc_mk2.name: MaxDoc Mk.2
maxdoc_mk2.description: Upgraded field medicine. Seals most wounds in seconds.

maxdoc_mk3.name: MaxDoc Mk.3
maxdoc_mk3.description: Military-grade medical inhaler. Used by Trauma Team first responders.

bounceback_mk1.name: BounceBack Mk.1
bounceback_mk1.description: An injectable coagulant. Quick, cheap, gets you moving again.

bounceback_mk3.name: BounceBack Mk.3
bounceback_mk3.description: Serious trauma kit. Rebuilds tissue, rebalances biochem. Feels weird. Works great.

alcohol.name: Alcohol
alcohol.description: Liquid courage. +10 damage for 2 turns. Makes you brave. Not necessarily smart.

black_lace.name: Black Lace
black_lace.description: Military combat stimulant. Grants double attack for 2 turns. Dangerously addictive.

militech_data_shard.name: Militech Data Shard
militech_data_shard.description: Encrypted corporate data. Valuable to the right people.

arasaka_access_card.name: Arasaka Access Card
arasaka_access_card.description: A high-clearance Arasaka keycard. Opens restricted zones.

oxy_booster.name: Oxy Booster
oxy_booster.description: Biomonitor-injected oxygen supplement. Reduces damage taken for 2 turns.

scrap_metal.name: Scrap Metal
scrap_metal.description: Salvaged metal plating. Used in crafting basic weapons and armor.

chemical_components.name: Chemical Components
chemical_components.description: Solvents, polymers, and reactive agents used in advanced crafting.

optical_fiber.name: Optical Fiber
optical_fiber.description: High-quality fiber optic cable. Essential for crafting cyberware and netrunning tools.

epic_component.name: Epic Crafting Component
epic_component.description: Advanced composite materials for high-tier crafting.
